hooks.command: bash -c 'f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$f" | grep -qE "apps/api/.*\.py$"; then cd apps/api && uv run ruff check --fix "$f" 2>&1 && uv run ruff format "$f" 2>&1; fi'
bash -c 'f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$f" | grep -qE "apps/web/.*\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$"; then cd apps/web && npx prettier --write "$f" 2>&1; fi'
